name: sync-skills orphan guard (--report-orphans) + dispose orphan + AGENTS.md home.tsx cite fix
description: sync-skills.mjs is additive-only and cannot detect a .claude/skills entry whose .agents master was removed (one confirmed orphan); plus a stale line-number cite in AGENTS.md.
acceptanceCriteria: F-046: add a --report-orphans mode to scripts/sync-skills.mjs (scan .claude/skills/ for entries with no .agents/skills master and no tech-group mapping; exit 1 if any), wired as an optional CI step (not pre-commit). Dispose of the confirmed orphan .claude/skills/my/e2e-infra.md — DECISION routed via the progress channel as needs-operator: DELETE (recommended; no master) vs PROMOTE to .agents/skills/my/e2e-infra/SKILL.md — raise before acting. F-041: fix the stale AGENTS.md profile-shapes cite (home.tsx:161 → the FamilyHome branch at ~:164); prefer a symbol-based cite (navigationContract.home.screen === 'FamilyHome') to resist line-rot. Edit the Profile-Shapes section ONLY — no AGENTS.md restructuring (PRG-03/B5 territory).
bodyText:
Findings
F-046 — scripts/sync-skills.mjs --check only verifies .agents/ → .claude/ forward; a removed master leaves an orphaned generated copy undetected. One confirmed: .claude/skills/my/e2e-infra.md has no .agents/skills/my/ master.
F-041 — AGENTS.md §Profile-Shapes cite home.tsx:161 is off (~:164); broader line-cite-rot class.
Boundary
F-041's edit is line-level to the Profile-Shapes section only. Must not collide with in-flight PRG-03/B5 skill/hook edits. Parallel-safe with the rest of PRG-14.
Channel decision
The orphan delete-vs-promote is a genuine operator call — surface as needs-operator on the lane outbox before acting (default: delete).
